name: One Pot Chicken Entree
recipeIngredient: Skinless and boneless chicken breast, cut into chunks (1 cup)
Water or homemade chicken stock with no salt (2 cups)
Cooked elbow macaroni or other pasta (1/2 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a pot, combine the chicken, carrots, and water.
2. Bring to a simmer and cover.
3. Cook for 8 to 10 minutes.
4. Add the peas and macaroni.
5. Continue cooking for another 4 to 5 minutes.
6. Puree the mixture until smooth.
7. Adjust consistency with extra water or stock if needed.
